commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human review is needed because this changes a public security hook contract, needs API-semantics approval, and still requires contributor-supplied real behavior proof.; Needs attention: The diff adds a security-sensitive plugin policy signal, but the source detector can be influenced by untrusted content lines.; Review finding: [P1] Parse only trusted wrapper metadata for sources — src/agents/agent-tools.befo... (sha=1216680cfad1ce9b78199d1782c1eb29dc7d6ac1)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds plugin-facing external-content provenance fields, detects wrapped external content in prompts and tool results, propagates it through tool policy hook contexts, and documents the hook contract.

PR surface: Source +344, Tests +330, Docs +39. Total +713 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. By source inspection, a wrapped external string whose untrusted body contains an extra `Source: Email` line will be scanned by the new detector and can add a forged source to `externalContent.sources`.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because this changes a public security hook contract, needs API-semantics approval, and still requires contributor-supplied real behavior proof.

target.title: fix(tools): propagate external content provenance to policy hooks
target.body:
Summary:
- Adds structured external-content provenance to tool-call policy hook types.
- Propagates provenance through HookContext, before_tool_call plugin events, trusted tool policy events, and tool hook context.
- Detects EXTERNAL_UNTRUSTED_CONTENT markers from the active embedded run prompt/session context.
- Refreshes provenance after same-run tool results through run-owned state keyed by `runId`, so fetch/browser/file external content is visible to later policy hooks even when wrapped tools use separate `HookContext` objects.
- Documents the public hook field and source semantics.
- Refreshes the plugin SDK type barrel so extension package-boundary cache keys invalidate when hook contract shapes change.

Why:
- External content is already wrapped as untrusted prompt text.
- Before this change, the post-model tool-call policy boundary did not receive structured provenance showing whether external content was present.
- Policy plugins could see the tool name, params, tool kind/input kind, run/toolCallId, derived paths, and session context, but not whether the tool call followed browser, web_fetch, email, webhook, file-fetch, or other untrusted external context.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed:
Same-run external content provenance reaches a later `before_tool_call` policy boundary after a `web_fetch` result introduces wrapped `EXTERNAL_UNTRUSTED_CONTENT`, even when the two wrapped tools do not share the same wrapper-local `HookContext`.

This is the reviewed production failure mode:
- `web_fetch` runs first with one wrapper `HookContext`
- `bash` / exec runs later with a different wrapper `HookContext`
- both contexts share only `runId`
- the later exec hook must still receive `externalContent: { "present": true, "sources": ["web_fetch"] }`

Real environment tested:
Local OpenClaw checkout on branch `fix/tool-call-external-provenance`, head `0daf2ca1f70a8b9992f42f7f57ab5841ae465994`, running the real `wrapToolWithBeforeToolCallHook -> runBeforeToolCallHook` runtime path through the focused e2e regression.

Exact command run after this patch:

```text
pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts src/agents/agent-tools.before-tool-call.e2e.test.ts -t "shares same-run external content provenance across split core tool wrapper contexts" --reporter=verbose --silent=false
```

Evidence after fix:
Terminal capture / copied live output from the real local proof run:

```text
[proof] pr=91800
[proof] head_sha=0daf2ca1f70a8b9992f42f7f57ab5841ae465994
[proof] branch=fix/tool-call-external-provenance
[proof-command] pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts src/agents/agent-tools.before-tool-call.e2e.test.ts -t "shares same-run external content provenance across split core tool wrapper contexts" --reporter=verbose --silent=false
[proof-case] pr=91800 split-wrapper-context web_fetch-to-exec provenance
[proof-path] runtime=wrapToolWithBeforeToolCallHook -> runBeforeToolCallHook
[proof-context] first_tool=web_fetch first_context_id=fetchContext
[proof-context] second_tool=exec second_context_id=execContext
[proof-context] shared_only=runId:run-split-fetch-then-exec
[proof-observed] first_event_externalContent=null
[proof-observed] first_context_externalContent=null
[proof-observed] second_event_toolName=exec
[proof-observed] second_event_runId=run-split-fetch-then-exec
[proof-observed] second_event_toolCallId=exec-1
[proof-observed] second_event_externalContent={"present":true,"sources":["web_fetch"]}
[proof-observed] second_context_externalContent={"present":true,"sources":["web_fetch"]}
[proof-result] split-wrapper-context external provenance propagated=PASS
```

Observed result after fix:
Before the `web_fetch` result returned, the first policy hook saw no `externalContent`. After `web_fetch` returned wrapped external content with `Source: Web Fetch`, the later exec policy hook received both `event.externalContent` and `ctx.externalContent` as `{"present":true,"sources":["web_fetch"]}`, despite using a separate wrapper `HookContext`.

What this proves:
This proves the specific reviewed failure mode. Provenance is no longer wrapper-local only. It is shared across same-run tool wrappers through run-owned state keyed by `runId`.

## Validation

- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/agent-tools.before-tool-call.e2e.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/agent-tools.before-tool-call.integration.e2e.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.before-tool-call.embedded-mode.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-subpaths.test.ts
- pnpm run test:extensions:package-boundary:compile
- git diff --check

## Review status

This update supersedes the earlier shared-context proof. The PR now includes a split-wrapper-context regression and real behavior proof for the run-owned provenance path requested by review.

Validation run locally after the split-context repair:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/agent-tools.before-tool-call.e2e.test.ts --reporter=dot` -> 58 passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/agent-tools.before-tool-call.integration.e2e.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.before-tool-call.embedded-mode.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-subpaths.test.ts --reporter=dot` -> 18 + 11 + 19 passed
- `pnpm run test:extensions:package-boundary:compile` -> passed
- `git diff --check` -> passed



## Additional real behavior proof: prompt history provenance

This current-head proof covers the remaining reviewed failure mode: wrapped external content already present in prompt/session history is detected before the later exec `before_tool_call` hook.

Current head: `1216680cfad1ce9b78199d1782c1eb29dc7d6ac1`

Command:

```text
pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts src/agents/agent-tools.before-tool-call.e2e.test.ts -t "seeds external content provenance from prompt history before exec hooks" --reporter=verbose --silent=false
```

Evidence:

```text
[proof] pr=91800
[proof] head_sha=1216680cfad1ce9b78199d1782c1eb29dc7d6ac1
[proof] branch=fix/tool-call-external-provenance
[proof-command] pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts src/agents/agent-tools.before-tool-call.e2e.test.ts -t "seeds external content provenance from prompt history before exec hooks" --reporter=verbose --silent=false
[proof-case] pr=91800 history-context web_fetch-to-exec provenance
[proof-path] runtime=prompt-history-scan -> runBeforeToolCallHook
[proof-context] first_source=promptHistoryMessages
[proof-context] second_tool=exec
[proof-observed] history_externalContent={"present":true,"sources":["web_fetch"]}
[proof-observed] event_externalContent={"present":true,"sources":["web_fetch"]}
[proof-observed] context_externalContent={"present":true,"sources":["web_fetch"]}
[proof-result] history-context external provenance propagated=PASS
```

## Real behavior proof: prompt history provenance

Behavior or issue addressed:
Wrapped external content already present in the active prompt/session history must be detected before a later exec `before_tool_call` policy hook, even when no same-run external tool result refresh happens first.

Real environment tested:
Local OpenClaw checkout on branch `fix/tool-call-external-provenance`, head `1216680cfad1ce9b78199d1782c1eb29dc7d6ac1`, using the real OpenClaw before_tool_call hook path and the prompt-history provenance detector added in this PR.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```text
pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts src/agents/agent-tools.before-tool-call.e2e.test.ts -t "seeds external content provenance from prompt history before exec hooks" --reporter=verbose --silent=false
```

Evidence after fix:
Terminal capture / copied live output from the local OpenClaw run:
```text
[proof-case] pr=91800 history-context web_fetch-to-exec provenance
[proof-path] runtime=prompt-history-scan -> runBeforeToolCallHook
[proof-context] first_source=promptHistoryMessages
[proof-context] second_tool=exec
[proof-observed] history_externalContent={"present":true,"sources":["web_fetch"]}
[proof-observed] event_externalContent={"present":true,"sources":["web_fetch"]}
[proof-observed] context_externalContent={"present":true,"sources":["web_fetch"]}
[proof-result] history-context external provenance propagated=PASS
```

Observed result after fix:
The prompt-history scan found `{"present":true,"sources":["web_fetch"]}`, and the later exec `before_tool_call` event and hook context both received the same `externalContent` value.

What was not tested:
No known gaps.
